streamlit
langchain
langchain-groq
langchain-community
langchain-core
python-dotenv

arxiv
wikipedia
ddgs

# UI / export
pandas
plotly

# YouTube — transcript extraction (4-strategy fallback chain)
# Strategy 1 & 2: handles both v0.x and v1.x APIs automatically
youtube-transcript-api

# Strategy 3: most robust — works on age-restricted, auto-generated subs
yt-dlp

# Strategy 4 & YouTube search fallback
youtube-search-python
